tree.name: Ivica Zubac
tree.tradeDescription: IND traded Isaiah Jackson, Bennedict Mathurin, a 2026 1st round pick (IND own), a 2028 2nd round pick (DAL own), and a 2029 1st round pick (IND own) to LAC for Ivica Zubac and Kobe Brown. LAC also received trade exceptions.

assetsGivenUp.name: Bennedict Mathurin
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard from Arizona, 6th overall pick in 2022 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Isaiah Jackson
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 22nd overall by LAL in 2021. Acquired in 5-team trade (Westbrook deal). IND sent Aaron Holiday and Isaiah Todd to WAS.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 5-team trade: LAL traded Isaiah Jackson to IND; IND traded Aaron Holiday and Isaiah Todd to WAS; WAS traded Russell Westbrook to LAL; BRK traded Spencer Dinwiddie to WAS; SAS traded Nikola Milutinov to BRK.

assetsGivenUp.name: Aaron Holiday
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard from UCLA, 23rd overall pick in 2018 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Isaiah Todd
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from MIL for Georgios Kalaitzakis, Sandro Mamukelashvili, and two 2nd round picks

assetsGivenUp.name: Georgios Kalaitzakis
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 60th overall by Indiana in 2021 using a pick acquired from Utah. Sent to MIL the next day in the Isaiah Todd trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick (#60)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: UTA trades 2021 2nd round pick (future) and cash ($1MM) to IND for Jarrell Brantley
assetsGivenUp.note: Utah's future 2nd rounder, acquired for Jarrell Brantley.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jarrell Brantley
assetsGivenUp.note: Undrafted forward from College of Charleston. Sent to Utah for a future 2nd round pick.

assetsGivenUp.name: Sandro Mamukelashvili
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 54th overall by Indiana in 2021 using a pick acquired from Houston. Sent to MIL the next day in the Isaiah Todd trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick (#54)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: HOU trades 2021 2nd round pick (future), Wade Baldwin, Maarty Leunen, and Nik Stauskas to IND for cash
assetsGivenUp.note: Houston's future 2nd rounder, acquired in a cash dump deal.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#46)
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to MIL in the Isaiah Todd trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to MIL in the Isaiah Todd trade.

assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIL trades Isaiah Todd (#31 pick) to IND for Georgios Kalaitzakis, Sandro Mamukelashvili, 2024 2nd round pick (Cam Christie), and 2026 2nd round pick

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick via DAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Dallas's own 2nd round pick, acquired from SAC in Chris Duarte trade (July 6, 2023)
